capability.name: Base Articulation
capability.description: This capability enables creation of articulated mechanical systems using articulation.

requirements.name: has-articulation-root
requirements.message: Articulated assets must have exactly one ArticulationRootAPI applied to establish the physics simulation root.

requirements.name: non-adjacent-collision-meshes-do-not-clash
requirements.message: Collision meshes on non-adjacent links in the articulation hierarchy must not overlap or intersect at the default pose.
